# truewatch_monitors (Data Source)

The `truewatch_monitors` data source lists TrueWatch monitors/checkers by search and optional filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `alert_policy_uuid` (String) Alert policy UUID filter.
- `checker_uuid` (String) Comma-separated checker UUID filter.
- `dashboard_uuid` (String) Dashboard UUID filter.
- `search` (String) Monitor search keyword.
- `status` (String) Monitor status filter, such as 0 or 2.
- `tags_uuid` (String) Comma-separated monitor tag UUID filter.
- `type` (String) Checker type filter, such as simpleCheck. Leave empty to list all monitor/checker types.

### Read-Only

- `monitors` (Attributes List) Matched monitors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitors))

<a id="nestedatt--monitors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitors`

Read-Only:

- `alert_policy_uuids` (List of String) Attached alert policy UUIDs.
- `dashboard_uuid` (String) Associated dashboard UUID.
- `monitor_name` (String) Monitor group name.
- `monitor_uuid` (String) Monitor group UUID.
- `name` (String) Monitor/checker name.
- `status` (Number) Monitor status.
- `tags` (List of String) Monitor tag names.
- `type` (String) Monitor type, such as trigger or smartMonitor.
- `uuid` (String) Monitor/checker UUID.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) Workspace UUID.
